pageName: TiDB Cloud for AWS: Web3 Scenario Analysis

meta.title: TiDB Cloud for AWS: Web3 Scenario Analysis
meta.description: Discover how TiDB Cloud on AWS scales Web3 applications with real-time data processing, global infrastructure, and seamless AWS integration.

props.headline: Scale Web3 Applications with TiDB Cloud on AWS
props.subheadline: Mature ecosystem, global infrastructure, and efficient business closure. Deploy Web3 applications at scale with enterprise-grade performance and compliance.

props.eyebrow: Why Choose TiDB for AWS Web3
props.title: Four Strategic Advantages

items.title: Enterprise Customer Base & AWS Integration
items.description: Largest enterprise customer foundation on AWS with proven Web3 and fintech cases. Seamless integration with VPC, EKS, and S3 for faster project delivery.

items.title: Global Infrastructure Capabilities
items.description: Broadest global Region/AZ coverage with mature cross-region disaster recovery. Native multi-AZ high availability for Web3 global deployment.

items.title: AWS Marketplace Integration
items.description: Simplified procurement through AWS Marketplace. Unified billing, minute-level provisioning, and pay-as-you-go pricing. Accelerate sales cycles from months to days.

props.title: Five Core Scenarios for TiDB on AWS
props.subtitle: Real-world Web3 applications powered by TiDB's distributed architecture and HTAP capabilities

tabs.label: On-Chain Data Aggregation
tabs.description: Real-time multi-chain data consolidation and display
bullets: Real-time ingestion from multiple blockchains (Ethereum, Solana, L2s)
Native full-text search for token names, symbols, and contract addresses
Sub-millisecond multi-dimensional asset search at scale (billions of records)
Semantic tagging and whale/bot address classification
Eliminates ODS→DWD→DWM→DWS→ADS multi-layer architecture

tabs.label: Trading Order System
tabs.description: High-concurrency transaction processing with real-time analytics
bullets: Support millions of IOPS for order placement and history queries
Zero-downtime horizontal scaling during peak trading periods
Global consistency reads via TSO mechanism
HTAP dual-engine: TiKV for OLTP, TiFlash for real-time analytics
Automatic data rebalancing without manual sharding maintenance
Storage capacity up to hundreds of TB, support trillions of records

tabs.label: Reconciliation & Risk Control
tabs.description: Financial reconciliation with millisecond-level data synchronization
bullets: Unified data storage eliminates cross-shard JOIN complexity
Separate OLTP/OLAP loads via HTAP architecture
Millisecond real-time data sync for high-concurrency updates
MySQL compatibility ensures efficient development
Consolidated audit trail for regulatory compliance

tabs.label: AI Agent & Chat Memory
tabs.description: Scalable long-term memory infrastructure for Web3 AI agents
bullets: One Database per Agent architecture for data isolation
Snapshot/Branch support for memory version management
HTAP for real-time + analytical workloads on chat/behavior data
Serverless architecture optimizes cost per million light instances
Multi-tenant capable: 100M+ lightweight data instances

tabs.label: PB-Scale Multi-Chain Data Warehouse
tabs.description: Petabyte-scale lakehouse for cross-chain data analytics
bullets: TiDB Cloud Lake: COPY INTO from S3 (NDJSON/Parquet) directly
Domain isolation: separate Ingestion WH and Mining WH
Zero resource contention between data ingestion and analysis
Address clustering and attribution across blockchains
Taint analysis for regulatory compliance and fraud detection
Dramatically lower storage tax vs. traditional data warehouses

items.title: Real-Time Performance
items.description: Raft-based strong consistency ensures instant data accuracy for address tracking and real-time analytics.

items.title: Simplified Architecture
items.description: Replace multi-layer data pipelines with single unified storage layer. Reduce operational complexity and accelerate time-to-market.

items.title: Elastic Scalability
items.description: Compute-storage separation enables on-demand scaling during peaks. Automatic data rebalancing eliminates manual sharding.

items.title: Enterprise Compliance
items.description: Comprehensive compliance framework for fintech and Web3. Proven by leading institutions and decentralized platforms.

items.title: Multi-Chain Native
items.description: Cross-chain data consolidation and search. Full-text indexing and semantic tagging across billions of on-chain records.

items.title: HTAP Dual Engines
items.description: TiKV for transactional workloads, TiFlash for analytical queries. No data movement—instant consistency.

items.label: Production Deployments
items.description: Web3 and fintech customers on AWS

items.label: Data Scale
items.description: Single cluster capacity for multi-chain warehouses

items.label: Search Latency
items.description: Full-text index on billions of on-chain records

props.title: Deploy TiDB Cloud on AWS Today
props.subtitle: Scale your Web3 application with a database built for Web3. Start free and pay only for what you use.
